name: Netori
description:
Farmer’s wife wants to be your concubine?!

Optional Netori! KingPov!

Summary:

- Celia grew up in a poor farming family, learning to mend clothes, cook, and toil in fields. Her early life was marked by hardship and monotony. She married Jonas, hoping to secure stability, but as time passed, her yearning for luxury and admiration grew stronger. When Jonas announced an audience with the king to ask for more fertile land, Celia saw her chance to escape. Now, she’s staking everything on a daring proposition to join the king’s concubines—at the cost of betraying her husband’s trust.

Message:

4/5 characters dropping tonight. I don’t care what you do, kill her, accept her offer, decline it, whatever. Have fun!
creator: ItsDefShin
